overview: AWM: Makeovers By Aastha is a luxury 3D animated portfolio website for a premier bridal makeup artist based in Lucknow. Features stunning pinkish-dark theme with advanced Three.js 3D animations, celebrity-grade portfolio showcase, Indian reviews, full services section, FAQ, and contact map.
features: 3D animated hero section with floating particles and moving objects
Premium portfolio gallery with 12 bridal photo showcases
Services section with 3D card animations (Bridal, Party, Celebrity)
Indian testimonials with star ratings and scroll animations
Why Choose Us section highlighting celebrity collaborations
Google Maps location embed for Lucknow studio
Floating WhatsApp and Instagram action buttons
Full pinkish-dark luxury theme with blurry glow effects throughout
